channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rain outlet drainage in dangerous condition close to Chislehurst girls schools, 25th May
item.description:
Yes this has been there for more than a month now.please take immediate and urgent action to fix the drainage broken, dangerous for school children Chislehurst girls school

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaverwood Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes and damaged roundabout, 24th May
item.description:
Damaged mini roundabout with multiple potholes on and around the mini roundabout.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes along a 10-20 metre stretch of road from the mini roundabout in the direction of Elmstead Woods Station, 24th May
item.description:
There have been multiple potholes and damage to the road for a long time and this has gotten worse over the past year.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Part stolen bike - abandoned frame, 24th May
item.description:
Reported over a month ago but no action. This is not a hire bike. Please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Kennington Road, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime Bikes Blocking Pedestrian Crossing near 231 Rye Lane, 24th May
item.description:
Dozens of Lime bikes are completely blocking the pavement near Nags Head Peckham 231 Rye Ln, making it impossible for pedestrians to cross safely. Vulnerable users, including people with prams and wheelchair users, are being forced to walk dangerously in the main road (as pictured). Please send an enforcement team to clear the obstruction and fine the operator immediately

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 202-204, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous oxide cans left up childrens slide., 24th May
item.description:
Nitrous oxide cannistors and baloons left up on tall slide. Found my 5year old and other kids playing with them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Iona Close, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entire Street, 24th May
item.description:
The signage is fading, and right outside our postcode NW32JB a pothole has been filled but cars still make a noise, there is sand and stones in the parking spot opposite #116 next to the verge and the condition of the road should be better and cater for quieter traffic noise. So many cars speed here that clearer signage on the road and on the street must be in place.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 122, Mansfield Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on river path, 24th May
item.description:
Rubbish on tge river path

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Newnton Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle SORN but in public carpark, 24th May
item.description:
Car has not moved for months. Apparently SORN but taking up a limited space in a public carpark

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barson Close, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All lights are out, 24th May
item.description:
All the street lights are out in Mottingham Road in the village , it’s very dark & eerie

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: About 6 bags of dumped rubbish, 24th May
item.description:
The bags have been there about 6 days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edison Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park Inaccessible to wheelchair users, 24th May
item.description:
The access from Bethune Avenue into Bethune Park is rocky, overgrown in parts, has no smooth surface. For wheelchair and mobility scooter users trying to access the park, it is an horrendous experience. It is so bad as to make it inaccessible for the disabled and the mobility impaired. Something must be done! It is my sincerest hope that given the Council's experience of laying smooth surfaces, that access to Bethune Park by wheelchair users can be made a reasonable experience.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Park Way, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The usual Sunday morning ripped up commercial waste, 24th May
item.description:
…from Micky’s chippy. It does not effing work Hackney and I am effing fed up of having to report this effing mess every single weekend!!!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair close to the bridge, 24th May
item.description:
This white kitchen chair has been there 2 or 3 days
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley opp. 46 Thicket. This looks like one of the 2 trolleys that were near the bridge (already reported by someone else). I don't know what has happened to the 2nd one., 24th May
item.description:
This trolley is being moved about. It has only been in its present position from today.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti everywhere along Waterloo Bridge, on all the brickwork, maps etc., 24th May
item.description:
Widespread graffiti all along this famous bridge. Incredible that this is not addressed in a major global city. Makes the area feel and look unsafe and outside of the law. Thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lancaster Place, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees in alleyway, 24th May
item.description:
Many trees are growing in the alleyway. I am worried about the damage to the private properties near the trees caused by the roots as well as them falling towards the properties in the case of a storm. Can they please be inspected and removed?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Granville Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox bagged up in bin, 24th May
item.description:
A dead fox was a found in the back garden of 84 Ridgeway Drive. The house in question has been abandoned for some years, but the smell was getting quite bad. The fox has been collected and is now ready to be removed. The body has been placed in two black sacks and left in a bin at the front of the property.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ridgeway Drive, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on pavement, 24th May
item.description:
This shop closed down on 15 May. Despite signage on the windows, donations are still frequently left outside.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Chatterton Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two ton bags of concrete etc, 24th May
item.description:
Rubbish in ton bags. May or may not be asbestos
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
